##NAMES=Furutobeite
##RRUFFID=R060937
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Cu,Ag)_6_PbS_4_
##LOCALITY=Tsumeb mine, Tsumeb, Otavi District, Oshikoto, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Steel gray metallic elongated prisms, associated with quartz, tennantite, and djurleite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060937
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Cu_4.97_Ag_1.07_)Pb_1.03_S_4_ ; (Dark areas are djurleite, Cu_1.89_Ag_0.02_S)
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 20.048 b: 3.9646 c: 9.6985 alpha: 90 beta: 101.524 gamma: 90 volume: 755.3 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
